description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a rectangular fence and lined with tall, slender trees along the perimeter. The structure features a flat roof with clean, angular lines and a mix of wood and concrete finishes on the exterior walls. The front yard is landscaped with a large central tree, circular stepping stones, and a seating area with outdoor furniture. To one side, there is a rectangular swimming pool bordered by a wooden deck and lounge chairs, while the opposite side has a paved driveway leading to a garage. Decorative metal gates and panels are integrated into the fencing, adding a contemporary touch. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with landscaped yard, pool, and perimeter trees, featuring wood and concrete finishes and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central tree, outdoor seating area, and decorative gate with a clear view of the pool and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, wooden deck, and the row of trees along the fence, with the garage partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the garage, and the paved driveway, with the landscaped yard and tree in the foreground.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the side yard, tall perimeter trees, and the overall layout of the bungalow and its outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
